+import AppKit
+import SwiftUI
+
+enum SettingsSection: String, CaseIterable, Identifiable {
+    case recording
+    case cleanup
+    case corrections
+    case models
+    case history
+    case general
+
+    var id: String {
+        rawValue
+    }
+
+    var title: String {
+        switch self {
+        case .recording:
+            return "Recording"
+        case .cleanup:
+            return "Cleanup"
+        case .corrections:
+            return "Corrections"
+        case .models:
+            return "Models"
+        case .history:
+            return "History"
+        case .general:
+            return "General"
+        }
+    }
+
+    var subtitle: String {
+        switch self {
+        case .recording:
+            return "Shortcuts, microphone input, dictation testing, and sound feedback."
+        case .cleanup:
+            return "Prompt cleanup, OCR context, and learning behavior."
+        case .corrections:
+            return "Words and replacements Ghost Pepper should preserve."
+        case .models:
+            return "Speech and cleanup model downloads and runtime status."
+        case .history:
+            return "Saved recordings, reruns, and cleanup experiments."
+        case .general:
+            return "Startup behavior and app-wide preferences."
+        }
+    }
+
+    var iconName: String {
+        switch self {
+        case .recording:
+            return "waveform.and.mic"
+        case .cleanup:
+            return "sparkles"
+        case .corrections:
+            return "text.badge.checkmark"
+        case .models:
+            return "brain"
+        case .history:
+            return "waveform.badge.magnifyingglass"
+        case .general:
+            return "gearshape"
+        }
+    }
+}
+
+enum SettingsTestDictationPhase: Equatable {
+    case idle
+    case recording
+    case transcribing
+}
+
+enum SettingsSpeechModelPhase: Equatable {
+    case idle
+    case loading
+    case ready
+    case error
+}
+
+struct SettingsSpeechModelSnapshot: Equatable {
+    var phase: SettingsSpeechModelPhase
+    var errorMessage: String?
+    var downloadProgress: Double?
+    var loadedModelID: String?
+    var cachedModelIDs: Set<String>
+
+    static let idle = SettingsSpeechModelSnapshot(
+        phase: .idle,
+        errorMessage: nil,
+        downloadProgress: nil,
+        loadedModelID: nil,
+        cachedModelIDs: []
+    )
+
+    init(
+        phase: SettingsSpeechModelPhase,
+        errorMessage: String?,
+        downloadProgress: Double?,
+        loadedModelID: String?,
+        cachedModelIDs: Set<String>
+    ) {
+        self.phase = phase
+        self.errorMessage = errorMessage
+        self.downloadProgress = downloadProgress
+        self.loadedModelID = loadedModelID
+        self.cachedModelIDs = cachedModelIDs
+    }
+
+    @MainActor
+    init(manager: SpeechModelManager) {
+        phase = switch manager.phase {
+        case .idle:
+            .idle
+        case .loading:
+            .loading
+        case .ready:
+            .ready
+        case .error:
+            .error
+        }
+        errorMessage = manager.errorMessage
+        downloadProgress = manager.downloadProgress
+        loadedModelID = manager.loadedModelID
+        cachedModelIDs = manager.cachedModelIDs
+    }
+}
+
+enum SettingsCleanupModelPhase: Equatable {
+    case idle
+    case downloading
+    case loading
+    case ready
+    case error
+}
+
+struct SettingsCleanupModelSnapshot: Equatable {
+    var phase: SettingsCleanupModelPhase
+    var errorMessage: String?
+    var downloadProgress: Double?
+    var loadedModelID: String?
+    var cachedModelIDs: Set<String>
+
+    static let idle = SettingsCleanupModelSnapshot(
+        phase: .idle,
+        errorMessage: nil,
+        downloadProgress: nil,
+        loadedModelID: nil,
+        cachedModelIDs: []
+    )
+
+    init(
+        phase: SettingsCleanupModelPhase,
+        errorMessage: String?,
+        downloadProgress: Double?,
+        loadedModelID: String?,
+        cachedModelIDs: Set<String>
+    ) {
+        self.phase = phase
+        self.errorMessage = errorMessage
+        self.downloadProgress = downloadProgress
+        self.loadedModelID = loadedModelID
+        self.cachedModelIDs = cachedModelIDs
+    }
+
+    @MainActor
+    init(manager: any CleanupModelManaging) {
+        phase = switch manager.phase {
+        case .idle:
+            .idle
+        case .downloading:
+            .downloading
+        case .loading:
+            .loading
+        case .ready:
+            .ready
+        case .error:
+            .error
+        }
+        errorMessage = manager.errorMessage
+        downloadProgress = manager.downloadProgress
+        loadedModelID = manager.loadedModelID
+        cachedModelIDs = manager.cachedModelIDs
+    }
+}
+
+enum RuntimeModelRowStatus: Equatable {
+    case loaded
+    case loading
+    case downloading(progress: Double?)
+    case notLoaded
+
+    var text: String {
+        switch self {
+        case .loaded:
+            return "Loaded"
+        case .loading:
+            return "Loading"
+        case let .downloading(progress):
+            guard let progress else {
+                return "Preparing"
+            }
+            return "Downloading \(Int((progress * 100).rounded()))%"
+        case .notLoaded:
+            return "Not loaded"
+        }
+    }
+}
+
+struct RuntimeModelRow: Identifiable, Equatable {
+    let id: String
+    let name: String
+    let detail: String
+    let status: RuntimeModelRowStatus
+    let isSelected: Bool
+}
+
+struct RuntimeModelInventory: Equatable {
+    let rows: [RuntimeModelRow]
+    let activeDownloadSummary: String?
+
+    init(
+        speechSnapshot: SettingsSpeechModelSnapshot,
+        cleanupSnapshot: SettingsCleanupModelSnapshot,
+        selectedSpeechModelID: String,
+        selectedCleanupModelID: String
+    ) {
+        rows =
+            SpeechModelDescriptor.catalog.map { descriptor in
+                RuntimeModelRow(
+                    id: descriptor.id,
+                    name: descriptor.title,
+                    detail: "\(descriptor.variantLabel) • \(descriptor.approximateSizeLabel)",
+                    status: Self.speechStatus(
+                        for: descriptor,
+                        snapshot: speechSnapshot,
+                        selectedModelID: selectedSpeechModelID
+                    ),
+                    isSelected: descriptor.id == selectedSpeechModelID
+                )
+            } +
+            CleanupModelDescriptor.catalog.map { descriptor in
+                RuntimeModelRow(
+                    id: descriptor.id,
+                    name: "\(descriptor.parameterCountLabel) \(descriptor.speedLabel)",
+                    detail: "\(descriptor.approximateSizeLabel) • \(descriptor.maxTokenCount) tokens",
+                    status: Self.cleanupStatus(
+                        for: descriptor,
+                        snapshot: cleanupSnapshot,
+                        selectedModelID: selectedCleanupModelID
+                    ),
+                    isSelected: descriptor.id == selectedCleanupModelID
+                )
+            }
+
+        activeDownloadSummary = Self.downloadSummary(
+            speechSnapshot: speechSnapshot,
+            cleanupSnapshot: cleanupSnapshot,
+            selectedSpeechModelID: selectedSpeechModelID,
+            selectedCleanupModelID: selectedCleanupModelID
+        )
+    }
+
+    private static func speechStatus(
+        for descriptor: SpeechModelDescriptor,
+        snapshot: SettingsSpeechModelSnapshot,
+        selectedModelID: String
+    ) -> RuntimeModelRowStatus {
+        let isCached = snapshot.cachedModelIDs.contains(descriptor.id)
+        if
+            snapshot.phase == .loading,
+            descriptor.id == selectedModelID,
+            !isCached
+        {
+            return .downloading(progress: snapshot.downloadProgress)
+        }
+
+        if
+            snapshot.phase == .loading,
+            descriptor.id == selectedModelID,
+            isCached
+        {
+            return .loading
+        }
+
+        return isCached ? .loaded : .notLoaded
+    }
+
+    private static func cleanupStatus(
+        for descriptor: CleanupModelDescriptor,
+        snapshot: SettingsCleanupModelSnapshot,
+        selectedModelID: String
+    ) -> RuntimeModelRowStatus {
+        if
+            snapshot.phase == .downloading,
+            descriptor.id == selectedModelID
+        {
+            return .downloading(progress: snapshot.downloadProgress)
+        }
+
+        if
+            snapshot.phase == .loading,
+            descriptor.id == selectedModelID
+        {
+            return .loading
+        }
+
+        return snapshot.cachedModelIDs.contains(descriptor.id) ? .loaded : .notLoaded
+    }
+
+    private static func downloadSummary(
+        speechSnapshot: SettingsSpeechModelSnapshot,
+        cleanupSnapshot: SettingsCleanupModelSnapshot,
+        selectedSpeechModelID: String,
+        selectedCleanupModelID: String
+    ) -> String? {
+        if
+            speechSnapshot.phase == .loading,
+            let descriptor = SpeechModelDescriptor.catalogEntry(id: selectedSpeechModelID),
+            !speechSnapshot.cachedModelIDs.contains(descriptor.id)
+        {
+            return downloadSummaryText(name: descriptor.title, progress: speechSnapshot.downloadProgress)
+        }
+
+        if
+            cleanupSnapshot.phase == .downloading,
+            let descriptor = CleanupModelDescriptor.catalogEntry(id: selectedCleanupModelID)
+        {
+            return downloadSummaryText(
+                name: "\(descriptor.parameterCountLabel) \(descriptor.speedLabel)",
+                progress: cleanupSnapshot.downloadProgress
+            )
+        }
+
+        return nil
+    }
+
+    private static func downloadSummaryText(name: String, progress: Double?) -> String {
+        guard let progress else {
+            return "Preparing \(name)..."
+        }
+        return "Downloading \(name) (\(Int((progress * 100).rounded()))%)..."
+    }
+}
+
+enum TextPaneMetrics {
+    static func height(for text: String, minimum: CGFloat, maximum: CGFloat) -> CGFloat {
+        let lineCount = max(1, text.components(separatedBy: .newlines).count)
+        let computedHeight = CGFloat(lineCount * 20) + 28
+        return min(maximum, max(minimum, computedHeight))
+    }
+}

+    func appear() {
+        guard !isVisible else {
+            return
+        }
+
+        isVisible = true
+        synchronizeFromSettingsStore()
+        refreshPermissionState()
+        loadInputDevices()
+        syncHistoryDefaults()
+        historyEntries = loadHistoryEntries()
+        startActivationObserver()
+        startPermissionPollingIfNeeded()
+        startModelStateRefreshLoop()
+    }
+
+    func disappear() {
+        if isVisible {
+            isVisible = false
+            activationObserver.map(notificationCenter.removeObserver(_:))
+            activationObserver = nil
+            permissionPollingTask?.cancel()
+            permissionPollingTask = nil
+            modelStateRefreshTask?.cancel()
+            modelStateRefreshTask = nil
+        }
+
+        cancelTestDictation()
+    }
+
+    func grantAccessibilityPermission() {
+        accessibilityGranted = accessibilityPermission.isTrusted(prompt: true)
+        startPermissionPollingIfNeeded()
+    }
+
+    func grantInputMonitoringPermission() {
+        _ = inputMonitoringPermission.requestAccess()
+        systemSettingsOpener.open(.inputMonitoring)
+        inputMonitoringGranted = inputMonitoringPermission.isGranted()
+        startPermissionPollingIfNeeded()
+    }
+
+    func openScreenRecordingSettings() {
+        systemSettingsOpener.open(.screenRecording)
+    }
+
+    func openCleanupPromptWindow() {
+        showCleanupPromptWindow()
+    }
+
+    func setFrontmostWindowContextEnabled(_ isEnabled: Bool) {
+        frontmostWindowContextEnabled = isEnabled
+    }
+
+    func setPostPasteLearningEnabled(_ isEnabled: Bool) {
+        postPasteLearningEnabled = isEnabled
+    }
+
+    func setIgnoreOtherSpeakers(_ isEnabled: Bool) {
+        ignoreOtherSpeakers = isEnabled
+    }
+
+    func setPlaySounds(_ isEnabled: Bool) {
+        playSounds = isEnabled
+    }
+
+    func resetCleanupPrompt() {
+        cleanupPrompt = SettingsStore.defaultCleanupPrompt
+    }
+
+    func setLaunchAtLoginEnabled(_ isEnabled: Bool) {
+        launchAtLoginEnabled = updateLaunchAtLogin(isEnabled)
+    }
+
+    func selectInputDevice(id: String) {
+        selectedInputDeviceID = id
+    }
+
+    func selectSpeechModel(id: String) async {
+        guard selectedSpeechModelID != id else {
+            return
+        }
+
+        selectedSpeechModelID = id
+        await loadSpeechModel(id)
+        selectedSpeechModelID = settingsStore.speechModelID
+        syncModelSnapshots()
+    }
+
+    func selectCleanupModel(id: String) async {
+        guard selectedCleanupModelID != id else {
+            return
+        }
+
+        selectedCleanupModelID = id
+        await loadCleanupModel(id)
+        selectedCleanupModelID = settingsStore.selectedCleanupModelKind
+        syncModelSnapshots()
+    }
+
+    func startTestDictation() {
+        testDictationGeneration += 1
+        testDictationTranscript = nil
+        testDictationError = nil
+
+        do {
+            try audioRecorder.startRecording { _ in
+            }
+            testDictationPhase = .recording
+        } catch {
+            testDictationPhase = .idle
+            testDictationError = "Could not start recording."
+        }
+    }
+
+    func stopTestDictation() async {
+        let generation = testDictationGeneration
+        guard audioRecorder.isRecording else {
+            return
+        }
+
+        testDictationPhase = .transcribing
+        let samples = await audioRecorder.stopRecording()
+        let transcription = await speechTranscriber.transcribe(
+            samples: samples,
+            modelID: selectedSpeechModelID
+        )
+
+        guard generation == testDictationGeneration else {
+            return
+        }
+
+        testDictationPhase = .idle
+        if let transcription, !transcription.isEmpty {
+            testDictationTranscript = transcription
+            testDictationError = nil
+        } else {
+            testDictationTranscript = nil
+            testDictationError = "Ghost Pepper could not transcribe that sample."
+        }
+    }
+
+    private func synchronizeFromSettingsStore() {
+        cleanupEnabled = settingsStore.cleanupEnabled
+        cleanupPrompt = settingsStore.cleanupPrompt
+        frontmostWindowContextEnabled = settingsStore.frontmostWindowContextEnabled
+        postPasteLearningEnabled = settingsStore.postPasteLearningEnabled
+        ignoreOtherSpeakers = settingsStore.ignoreOtherSpeakers
+        playSounds = settingsStore.playSounds
+        preferredTranscriptionsDraft = settingsStore.preferredTranscriptionsDraft
+        commonlyMisheardDraft = settingsStore.commonlyMisheardDraft
+        launchAtLoginEnabled = settingsStore.launchAtLoginEnabled
+        selectedSpeechModelID = settingsStore.speechModelID
+        selectedCleanupModelID = settingsStore.selectedCleanupModelKind
+        syncModelSnapshots()
+    }
+
+    private func refreshPermissionState() {
+        accessibilityGranted = accessibilityPermission.isTrusted(prompt: false)
+        inputMonitoringGranted = inputMonitoringPermission.isGranted()
+        screenRecordingState = screenRecordingPermission.refresh()
+
+        if accessibilityGranted && inputMonitoringGranted {
+            permissionPollingTask?.cancel()
+            permissionPollingTask = nil
+        } else {
+            startPermissionPollingIfNeeded()
+        }
+    }
+
+    private func loadInputDevices() {
+        let devices = audioInputDeviceCatalog.inputDevices()
+        inputDevices = devices
+
+        if
+            let selectedInputDeviceID,
+            devices.contains(where: { $0.id == selectedInputDeviceID })
+        {
+            return
+        }
+
+        selectedInputDeviceID = audioInputDeviceCatalog.preferredInputDeviceID() ?? devices.first?.id
+    }
+
+    private func startActivationObserver() {
+        activationObserver = notificationCenter.addObserver(
+            forName: NSApplication.didBecomeActiveNotification,
+            object: nil,
+            queue: .main
+        ) { [weak self] _ in
+            Task { @MainActor [weak self] in
+                self?.refreshPermissionState()
+            }
+        }
+    }
+
+    private func startPermissionPollingIfNeeded() {
+        guard isVisible, shouldShowPermissionsCard, permissionPollingTask == nil else {
+            return
+        }
+
+        permissionPollingTask = Task { @MainActor [weak self] in
+            while let self, !Task.isCancelled {
+                await self.sleep(.seconds(2))
+                guard !Task.isCancelled else {
+                    return
+                }
+
+                self.accessibilityGranted = self.accessibilityPermission.isTrusted(prompt: false)
+                self.inputMonitoringGranted = self.inputMonitoringPermission.isGranted()
+                if !self.shouldShowPermissionsCard {
+                    self.permissionPollingTask?.cancel()
+                    self.permissionPollingTask = nil
+                    return
+                }
+            }
+        }
+    }
+
+    private func startModelStateRefreshLoop() {
+        modelStateRefreshTask?.cancel()
+        modelStateRefreshTask = Task { @MainActor [weak self] in
+            guard let self else {
+                return
+            }
+
+            await self.refreshModelCaches()
+            self.syncModelSnapshots()
+
+            while self.isVisible && !Task.isCancelled {
+                try? await Task.sleep(for: .milliseconds(200))
+                guard !Task.isCancelled else {
+                    return
+                }
+                self.syncModelSnapshots()
+            }
+        }
+    }
+
+    private func syncModelSnapshots() {
+        speechModelSnapshot = speechModelSnapshotProvider()
+        cleanupModelSnapshot = cleanupModelSnapshotProvider()
+    }
+
+    private func cancelTestDictation() {
+        testDictationGeneration += 1
+        testDictationTranscript = nil
+        testDictationError = nil
+        testDictationPhase = .idle
+
+        guard audioRecorder.isRecording else {
+            return
+        }
+
+        Task { [weak self] in
+            _ = await self?.audioRecorder.stopRecording()
+        }
+    }
+}

+    @State private var rotationDegrees = 0.0

+    var body: some View {
+        ZStack {
+            Circle()
+                .stroke(Color.secondary.opacity(0.25), lineWidth: 1)
+
+            Circle()
+                .trim(from: 0, to: sweepAmount)
+                .stroke(Color.orange, style: StrokeStyle(lineWidth: 2, lineCap: .round))
+                .rotationEffect(.degrees(rotationDegrees - 90))
+                .animation(progress == nil ? .linear(duration: 1).repeatForever(autoreverses: false) : .none, value: rotationDegrees)
+        }
+        .onAppear {
+            if progress == nil {
+                rotationDegrees = 360
+            }
+        }
+    }
+
+    private var sweepAmount: Double {
+        guard let progress else {
+            return 0.28
+        }
+
+        return min(1.0, max(0.05, progress))
+    }

+private final class SettingsShellAccessibilityPermission: AccessibilityPermissionChecking {

+
+    init(trusted: Bool) {

+private final class SettingsShellInputMonitoringPermission: InputMonitoringPermissionControlling, @unchecked Sendable {
+    var granted: Bool

+
+    init(granted: Bool) {
+        self.granted = granted
+    }
+
+    func isGranted() -> Bool {
+        granted
+    }
+
+    @discardableResult
+    func requestAccess() -> Bool {
+        requestAccessCallCount += 1
+        return granted
+    }

+    var state: ScreenRecordingPermissionState = .granted

+    @discardableResult
+    func refresh() -> ScreenRecordingPermissionState {
+        refreshCallCount += 1
+        return state

+    private var continuation: CheckedContinuation<Void, Never>?
+
+    func transcribe(samples: [Float], modelID: String?) async -> String? {
+        requests.append(Request(samples: samples, modelID: modelID))
+        if delay {
+            await withCheckedContinuation { continuation in
+                self.continuation = continuation
+            }
+        }
+        return result
+    }
+
+    func resume() {
+        continuation?.resume()
+        continuation = nil
+    }
+}

+    var loadedModelIDs: [String] = []

+    var entries: [TranscriptionLabEntry] = []
+}
+
+@MainActor
+private final class SettingsShellSleepRecorder {
+    private(set) var durations: [Duration] = []
+    var onSleep: (@MainActor () async -> Void)?
+
+    func sleep(for duration: Duration) async {
+        durations.append(duration)
+        await onSleep?()
+    }
+}
